allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@igorao79/uivix''\); console.log\(''Has Watermark:'', !!m.Watermark\); if\(m.Watermark\) console.log\(m.Watermark.toString\(\).substring\(0, 400\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''@igorao79/uivix''\); console.log\(''Has Watermark:'', Boolean\(m.Watermark\)\); if\(m.Watermark\) console.log\(m.Watermark.toString\(\).substring\(0, 400\)\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''version:'''', p.version\)}\)")
